request_payload.exposure_text: As a former intelligence analyst with 20 years in national security, I've seen firsthand how strategic autonomy isn't just about military strength—it's about protecting our civil liberties from foreign interference. Recent debates about alliance burden-sharing often overlook how our preparedness depends on maintaining strong, independent capabilities. When threats evolve, we can't afford to be reactive; we need proactive, sovereign solutions. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
